I've added a GitHub logo button beside the "Talk to us" button in the landing page header. The GitHub icon:

- Is placed right before the "Talk to us" button
- Links to `https://github.com/artpark-sahai-org/calibrate`
- Opens in a new tab
- Has a hover effect that changes the color from gray to darker gray
- Is responsive with appropriate sizing (`w-5 h-5 md:w-6 md:h-6`)
- Includes an `aria-label` for accessibility
